title: senecio jorquerae
intro: Senecio jorquerae, also known as Jorquera ragwort or Jorquera's burnet-sage, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, characterized by its small, yellow daisy-like flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Senecio jorquerae include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Senecio jorquerae include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
